log: === ROUND 1 ===
--- Lich's turn ---
--- Mountain Dwarf — Armored Tank's turn ---
ACTION: Cast Hypnotic Pattern (Level 3 slot, 2 remaining). DC 15 WIS save. 30ft cube.
→ Lich: IMMUNE to charmed! No effect.
→ No targets affected. Spell wasted.
=== ROUND 2 ===
--- Lich's turn ---
ACTION: Cast Finger of Death (Level 7 slot, 0 remaining). DC 20 CON save on Mountain Dwarf — Armored Tank.
→ Mountain Dwarf — Armored Tank: CON save [d20:13+4=17 vs DC 20] FAIL! 32 necrotic damage. HP: 27/59
--- Mountain Dwarf — Armored Tank's turn ---
ACTION: Cast Hold Person (Level 2 slot, 2 remaining). DC 15 WIS save on Lich.
→ Lich: WIS save [d20:2+9=11 vs DC 15] FAIL!
=== ROUND 3 ===
Lich is incapacitated — skipping turn.
Lich WIS save vs Hold Person: [d20:10+9=19 vs DC 15] SUCCESS — no longer paralyzed.
--- Mountain Dwarf — Armored Tank's turn ---
ACTION: Cast Vicious Mockery (Level 0). DC 15 WIS save on Lich.
→ Lich: WIS save [d20:14+9=23 vs DC 15] SUCCESS. No effect.
ACTION: Cast Healing Word (Level 1 slot) on Mountain Dwarf — Armored Tank.
→ Mountain Dwarf — Armored Tank healed for 7 HP. HP: 34/59
=== ROUND 4 ===
--- Lich's turn ---
ACTION: Cast Fireball (Level 3 slot, 2 remaining). DC 20 DEX save. 20ft sphere.
→ Mountain Dwarf — Armored Tank: FAIL! 22 fire damage + .
→ Concentration save: [d20(ADV):18+4=22 vs DC 11] MAINTAINED!
→ 1/1 targets affected.
--- Mountain Dwarf — Armored Tank's turn ---
→ Dropping concentration on Hold Person
ACTION: Cast Greater Invisibility (Level 4 slot, 1 remaining).
→ Mountain Dwarf — Armored Tank is affected by Greater Invisibility.
ACTION: Cast Healing Word (Level 1 slot) on Mountain Dwarf — Armored Tank.
→ Mountain Dwarf — Armored Tank healed for 7 HP. HP: 19/59
=== ROUND 5 ===
--- Lich's turn ---
ACTION: Cast Fireball (Level 3 slot, 1 remaining). DC 20 DEX save. 20ft sphere.
→ Mountain Dwarf — Armored Tank: SUCCESS. 16 damage (half).
→ No targets affected. Spell wasted.
--- Mountain Dwarf — Armored Tank's turn ---
ACTION: Cast Vicious Mockery (Level 0). DC 15 WIS save on Lich.
→ Lich: WIS save [d20:19+9=28 vs DC 15] SUCCESS. No effect.
ACTION: Cast Healing Word (Level 1 slot) on Mountain Dwarf — Armored Tank.
→ Mountain Dwarf — Armored Tank healed for 5 HP. HP: 8/59
=== ROUND 6 ===
--- Lich's turn ---
ACTION: Cast Fireball (Level 3 slot, 0 remaining). DC 20 DEX save. 20ft sphere.
→ Mountain Dwarf — Armored Tank: FAIL! 34 fire damage + .
→ Concentration save: BROKEN! Greater Invisibility ends!
→ 1/1 targets affected.
=== ENCOUNTER ENDED — Winner: ENEMY after 6 rounds ===
